default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy expanding beyond frontline communication to include operations, productivity, training, and development](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [SEO performance showing a 10-20% drop in clicks, potentially due to Google's AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Plans to implement FAQ sections and schema markup to boost SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Need to address keyword cannibalization and broken links in existing content](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Update

  - [147 articles published, including 25 new and 22 refreshed pieces](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [9 articles ready for review, 11 more expected by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [10 articles pending legal review for two months](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [New mind map created for content clusters, focusing on broader frontline workforce topics](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Expanding from frontline communication to operations, productivity, training, and development](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Employee texting platform and workplace translation articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Overall 10-20% drop in clicks observed across projects](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Google's AI overviews potentially impacting click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Plan to conduct detailed SEO analysis of top-performing pages for the past six months](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

### Content Improvement Initiatives

  - [Addressing keyword cannibalization issues](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Fixing broken links in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Implementing FAQ sections and schema markup to boost SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Considering long-form content for resources pages on topics like translation, safety, compliance, and SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Technical SEO Enhancements

  - [Exploring implementation of FAQ schema for Prismic CMS](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Aiming for automated schema implementation across all pages](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Recognizing the increased importance of FAQs with AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to conduct SEO performance audit using 6-month GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Implement FAQ sections and explore schema markup implementation for Prismic CMS](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Address keyword cannibalization and broken links with Sadeera next week](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Develop plan for content refresh and potential topic removals](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Jessica to share mind map for new content clustering strategy](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Investigate the drop in leads and its correlation with decreased clicks](https://fathom.video/share/o85x2ExM7wrNJ9VJNhag55C91NyerMAq?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

action_items.description: Investigate "not set" data issue in GA4 for current month. Identify cause of attribution problem for 3 leads.
Perform SEO analysis on blogs from 6-month GA4 report. Check click/lead impact, AI overview effects. Share findings w/ Jessica.
Collaborate w/ Sadeera on keyword cannibalization, mind map restructuring, broken links fix. Prepare update for next meeting.
Research FAQ schema implementation for Prismic CMS. Determine ease of automated deployment across all pages. Report back to Jessica.
